query: SELECT ticker, companyName, currency FROM stocks WHERE ticker IN ('MONC.MI', 'VGK.US', 'XLE.US', 'NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT ticker, companyName, currency FROM stocks WHERE ticker IN ('MONC.MI', 'VGK.US', 'XLE.US', 'NOVN.SW', 'NESN.SW')
stdout:
ticker	companyName	currency
MONC.MI	Moncler SpA	EUR
VGK.US	Vanguard FTSE Europe ETF	USD

NOVN.SW	Novartis AG	CHF
